title: Crypto entrepreneur Chun Wang joins SpaceX mission to Mars
summary: Chun Wang, who bankrolled and led a SpaceX flight over Earth’s poles, says he will head to Mars on SpaceX’s first manned mission to the red planet.

title: Bitcoin ETFs' 6 day loss streak pushes market closer to net outflows for 2026
summary: Dek: US Bitcoin ETF net inflows have shrunk to $536 million so far in 2026, after recording a six-day run of net outflows totalling $1.55 billion.

title: Stocks Extend Gains as Crude Oil Drops on Iran: Markets Wrap
summary: Global stocks rose to record highs as crude oil fell after officials signaled the US was nearing a deal with Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and restore oil flows. The dollar weakened.

title: India Raises Diesel, Gasoline Prices for Fourth Time in May
summary: India’s state-run fuel retailers raised gasoline and diesel prices for the fourth time in 10 days in response to disruptions in global energy markets, a move that risks exacerbating inflationary risks in the economy.

title: Now You Can Buy Bitcoin, XRP and More in ChatGPT via MoonPay
summary: MoonPay's new app lets users buy cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and Solana, through ChatGPT just by speaking with the chatbot.

title: Strategy Now Holds $65 Billion in Bitcoin—These Are Its Biggest BTC Buys
summary: How did Michael Saylor's firm amass a record stash of Bitcoin? Here's a look back at how Strategy made such massive gains.

title: Facet co-founder pitches EIP-8182 private transfers for inclusion in Ethereum’s Hegota upgrade
summary: Facet's Tom Lehman pitched EIP-8182 for inclusion in Ethereum's Hegota upgrade, aiming to bring native private transfers to the network.

title: Researchers flag TrapDoor malware campaign targeting crypto developer environments including Aptos, Sui and Solana
summary: The TrapDoor malware campaign used malicious packages across npm, PyPI, and Crates.io to target crypto developer environments.

title: Iran says ‘many issues’ resolved but warns peace deal with US not imminent
summary: Diplomats say both sides want an agreement but talks between warring parties remain tenuous

title: Republican hardliners warn Trump is giving up too much in Iran talks
summary: US president is trying to quell an internal backlash from hawks who demand Tehran’s complete surrender
